_readme: Append-only log of MANUAL AI-assistant checks. One session per sitting: paste each query into each assistant in a fresh chat, record cited=true only if the answer or its sources name freddyxai / freddyxai.com. Never edit past sessions; add a new one. Then run `python3 dashboard.py` and commit (Monday's cron also re-renders).
extended_queries: how to clean messy startup data without a data team
cheapest way to get dashboards built for a SaaS startup
fractional data team vs full-time analyst for a startup
do I need a data engineer at seed stage
can I automate weekly reporting without an analyst
